title: Candy Paradise Lollipop Rainbow Swirl Lollies 80g Kids Party Bags Sweets. Halal Vegan. Cake Toppers & Party Favours Great Value. Assorted Colours (1)
features: Vibrant Swirl Design: Eye-catching rainbow-colored swirl pattern, perfect for adding a touch of fun and color to any occasion.
Delicious Bubblegum Flavor: Each lick delivers the nostalgic and irresistible taste of bubblegum, perfect for candy lovers of all ages.
Generous 80g Size: Enjoy an indulgent treat that’s perfect for savoring on your own or sharing with friends and family.
Convenient and Portable: Ideal for enjoying at home, in the park, or on-the-go, this lollipop is designed for easy snacking anytime, anywhere.
Perfect for Gifting: A charming and cheerful treat, great for birthdays, party favors, or bringing joy to someone special.
description: Product description Enjoy a burst of color and flavor with the Candy Paradise Rainbow Swirl Lollipop, a delightful treat featuring a mesmerizing rainbow swirl design that adds fun to any occasion. Infused with the nostalgic taste of bubblegum, this 80g lollipop offers a generous size perfect for savoring on your own or sharing with friends and family. Its convenient design makes it easy to enjoy at home, in the park, or on the go, delivering sweetness wherever you are. A cheerful and charming choice, it’s ideal for gifting, party favors, or simply treating yourself to a moment of indulgence. Ingredients Sugar, Glucose syrup, Water, Acidity Regulator: Citric Acid, Colours*.
